title: athyrium × masayukianum
intro: Athyrium × masayukianum, also known as Masayuki's Lady Fern or the hybrid Lady Fern, is a rare, sterile fern hybrid that originated from a cross between Japanese Lady Fern (Athyrium niponicum) and a species of Athyrium. This plant is said to possess medicinal properties, particularly its rhizomes, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Athyrium × masayukianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use is mostly limited to traditional or folk medicine.
